default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX.ai's content marketing platform and services with Passbolt, exploring potential collaboration and addressing Passbolt's specific needs and concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai offers a comprehensive content marketing solution combining consulting, implementation, and an AI-powered platform](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Passbolt is in early stages of content marketing, facing challenges with CEO buy-in and proving ROI before significant investment](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai's platform can produce 8-15 high-quality content pieces weekly, with potential for quick impact (3-4 months) on traffic](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Timing and alignment with Passbolt's current marketing strategy development and team building are key considerations for engagement](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai's Content Marketing Approach

  - [Combines consulting, implementation, and an AI-powered platform](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [Typical engagement produces 8-15 content pieces weekly (50,000-100,000 words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Platform breaks down content creation into workflows, enhancing efficiency and quality](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Human-in-the-loop approach ensures content relevance and accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [Can adapt to various client scenarios (early-stage vs. established marketing teams)](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

### Passbolt's Current Marketing Situation

  - [Updating marketing strategy, consolidating brand elements (e.g., tone of voice)](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Planning to implement HubSpot CMS for improved content management](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Hiring a Product Marketing Manager and building out the marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [CEO requires proof of content marketing impact before significant investment](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
  - [Current website has limited marketing-related content](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

### Content Audit and Opportunities for Passbolt

  - [Passbolt has surprisingly high domain authority (39) for its content program phase](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2376.0)
  - [Significant gap in organic traffic compared to competitors (1,700 vs. hundreds of thousands)](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2467.0)
  - [Potential for developing a resource hub and glossary](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2622.0)
  - [Caution against generic strategies (e.g., password generator tools) that don't align with B2B focus](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)

### Challenges and Considerations

  - [Balancing the need for quick results with long-term content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2859.0)
  - [Aligning content creation with Passbolt's specific B2B focus and unique value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2710.0)
  - [Timing of engagement with GrowthX.ai relative to Passbolt's ongoing marketing developments](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sandro to discuss potential collaboration with Passbolt's CEO, focusing on the "leap of faith" required for engagement](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2720.0)
  - [If immediate collaboration is not possible, revisit discussion in late 2023 after Passbolt has launched new website and seen initial content results](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2780.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai to remain available for questions or a potential call with Passbolt's CEO to address specific concerns](https://fathom.video/share/K6mnTUxMA7fouV5jkaKVatX2pXdttPjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2859.0)

action_items.description: Discuss GrowthX proposal w/ CEO tmrw; address "leap of faith" on content mktg w/o proven results; relay decision to Kyle
If CEO approves, contact Kyle to proceed w/ GrowthX engagement; if not, plan to revisit late 2023 after website relaunch + initial content results (Oct/Nov)
